# Module 04 unlocked: Algorithms

Nice work, Blochi. You finished Module 03 and unlocked your next assignment.

Your mission in this module is to practice loops and manual problem solving.

## Tasks

1. Print the numbers 1 to 10 using a `for` loop.
2. Return the length of a word without using `.Length`.
3. Count how many times a letter appears in a sentence.
4. Sum all even numbers from 1 up to `max`.
5. Reverse a string manually.

Create a branch named `module-04`, solve the exercises in `modules/04-algorithms/Solution/Exercises.cs`, and push your work when you are done.
